setup_verification.verification_command: cmake -S . -B build/reverse-spec -G "Unix Makefiles" -DQUIC_BUILD_TEST=ON -DQUIC_TLS_LIB=quictls && cmake --build build/reverse-spec --target msquiccoretest msquicplatformtest msquictest -- -j2
notes: PowerShell, Ninja, and Clang were not installed; the documented CMake path with Unix Makefiles was used.
System OpenSSL 3.0.13 was too old for the project's OpenSSL >= 3.5.0 requirement, so the default quictls submodule build was used.
libnuma runtime was found but numa.h was not; this did not prevent the selected build or test targets from compiling.

discovery.individual_execution_feasibility: Not practical for all 3261 discovered GTest cases; CTest exposes the smallest stable project-native groups as three executable suites. Representative filtered groups were used where the full suite was long-running.

recovery_steps.result: Initialized required submodules including clog, googletest, openssl, quictls, and xdp-for-windows.
System OpenSSL version 3.0.13 was unsuitable; project required at least 3.5.0.
Configured CMake build using bundled quictls.
Built libmsquic.so and all three test executables.

tests.name: msquiccoretest
tests.excluded_reason: SpinFrame.SpinFrame1000000 caused the full CTest suite to run for more than four minutes without output and was treated as long-running stress/performance coverage.

tests.name: msquicplatformtest
tests.error_message: TlsTest.HandshakeCertFromFile failed because CertParamsFromFile was null.

tests.name: msquictest
tests.error_message: ValidateXdpMapConfigParam failed SetParam with 0x1; ValidateExecutionContext and ValidatePartition failed because Execution.IsValid() was false.
